ksa_text: Skill in developing actionable data and AI strategy recommendations, including prioritized roadmaps, capability investment plans, and organizational design recommendations.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: skill from Data Governance (affinity 0.88); no GOV-specific signals and low domain affinity. STRM composite is moderate-to-strong (0.4104). A Data Officer (Federal/DoD) would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in governance job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Officer (Federal/DoD) whose mandate centers on policy, oversight, and governance.
